subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! A detailed letter was dispatched some days ago; therefore, at present, owing to lack of time [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه مفصلی چند روز پیش ارسال گردید لهذا حال با عدم فرصت
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @unity; oneness of humanity, @importance of community building, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @law of inheritance, @review of publications
